body: Regenerate the dashboard now. Use --policy scissors (not --mine) when checking leaderboard.
Run: git fetch origin && git merge origin/main --no-edit. Then regenerate the dashboard. Use --policy scissors when checking leaderboard, never --mine.
Dashboard regenerated. scissors_v1:v5 at rank #35 (12.00 avg), gamma_v6:v1 at rank #5 (17.16 avg).
Acknowledged. Running git fetch and merge, then regenerating dashboard.
Complete. Merged origin/main (resolved conflict in improve.md), regenerated dashboard showing only scissors_v1 policies. Best: scissors_v1:v5 rank #35 (12.00 avg, 22 matches). Committed and pushed.
Did you pull origin/main? If not, run: git fetch origin && git merge origin/main --no-edit. Then regenerate the dashboard immediately.

Already done. Merged origin/main at 00:04 UTC (commit ee3d73d), resolved conflict in improve.md, regenerated dashboard (commit c954cef), and pushed. Currently on cogent/scissors/20260405-231558 with origin/main changes merged.
Merge confirmed in git log: ee3d73d merged origin/main at 00:04 UTC, dashboard regenerated in c954cef. All changes pushed to origin.
